name: Wireless Headphones
description: Premium noise-cancelling wireless headphones with 30-hour battery life, comfortable over-ear design, and crystal-clear audio quality. Perfect for music lovers and professionals.

name: Sneakers Air Max
description: Classic Air Max sneakers with responsive cushioning, breathable mesh upper, and durable rubber outsole. Iconic style meets all-day comfort.

name: Organic Cotton T-Shirt
description: Eco-friendly organic cotton t-shirt with a relaxed fit. Soft, breathable, and sustainably sourced. Available in multiple colors.

name: Smart Watch Pro
description: Advanced smartwatch with health monitoring, GPS tracking, waterproof design, and 7-day battery life. Your fitness companion.

name: Leather Backpack
description: Handcrafted genuine leather backpack with padded laptop compartment, multiple pockets, and premium brass hardware. Style meets functionality.

name: Bluetooth Speaker
description: Portable waterproof Bluetooth speaker with 360-degree sound, 20-hour battery, and built-in microphone. Take the party anywhere.

name: Yoga Mat Premium
description: Extra-thick premium yoga mat with non-slip surface, carrying strap, and alignment lines. Perfect for yoga, pilates, and stretching.

name: Mechanical Keyboard
description: RGB mechanical keyboard with Cherry MX switches, aluminum frame, and programmable keys. Built for gamers and typists alike.

name: Coffee Maker Deluxe
description: Programmable 12-cup coffee maker with thermal carafe, built-in grinder, and brew strength selector. Your perfect morning starts here.

name: Running Shoes Ultra
description: Lightweight running shoes with carbon fiber plate, responsive foam, and breathable knit upper. Designed for personal bests.

name: Desk Lamp LED
description: Adjustable LED desk lamp with wireless charging base, multiple color temperatures, and touch dimmer. Illuminate your workspace.

name: Stainless Water Bottle
description: Double-wall vacuum insulated water bottle that keeps drinks cold 24h or hot 12h. BPA-free, leak-proof, and eco-friendly.

name: Gaming Mouse
description: Ergonomic gaming mouse with 16000 DPI optical sensor, 8 programmable buttons, and customizable RGB lighting. Precision meets comfort.

name: Sunglasses Aviator
description: Classic aviator sunglasses with polarized UV400 lenses, lightweight titanium frame, and scratch-resistant coating. Timeless style.

name: Hard Drive 2TB
description: Portable 2TB external SSD with USB-C, read speeds up to 1050MB/s, and shock-resistant design. Carry your world in your pocket.

name: Electric Toothbrush
description: Sonic electric toothbrush with 5 cleaning modes, 2-minute smart timer, and USB-C charging. A dentist-recommended upgrade.

name: Plant Pot Set
description: Set of 3 modern ceramic plant pots with drainage holes and bamboo trays. Available in matte white, terracotta, and sage green.

name: Wireless Charger Pad
description: Fast wireless charging pad compatible with all Qi devices. Slim design with LED indicator and foreign object detection.

name: Winter Jacket
description: Insulated winter jacket with waterproof shell, down filling, and adjustable hood. Rated for temperatures down to -20°F.

name: Canvas Backpack
description: Vintage-style canvas backpack with leather trim, padded laptop sleeve, and drawstring closure. Rugged everyday carry.
